libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: When updating or generating tests for net.thisptr:jackson-jq:2.0.0-alpha1, use Jackson 3 imports such as tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode and tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper. Do not keep the 1.6.2-era com.fasterxml.jackson.databind imports or add Jackson 2 databind just to satisfy them; jackson-jq 2.0.0-alpha1 method signatures accept tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8741 [Automation] javac compile fails for net.thisptr:jackson-jq:2.0.0-alpha1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Copying the existing 1.6.2 test unchanged will fail javac because com.fasterxml.jackson.databind is no longer on the compile classpath for the tested 2.0.0-alpha1 setup.
Adding com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind would mask the import error but would not match jackson-jq 2.0.0-alpha1 APIs, which are typed against tools.jackson.databind.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed; jackson-jq 2.0.0-alpha1 already brings Jackson 3 databind transitively, but tests must use the Jackson 3 API packages.
